subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of 'Akká. Verily, there is none other God but Me, the Creator of the heavens and the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی ان استمعی ندائی من شطر عکا انه لا اله الا انا فاطر السماء و مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
